# @topogram/generator-vanilla-web

> Package-backed Topogram generator with package-local release preflight.

Use these commands:

- `npm run docs:rag:build` regenerates `llms-full.txt`.
- `npm run docs:rag:check` verifies package-local retrieval docs.
- `npm run check` verifies the package behavior.
- `npm run release:preflight` adds package dry-run and secret scanning before publish or broad sharing.

## Start

- [README](README.md): Author loop, package boundary, and release preflight.
- [Agent Guide](AGENTS.md): Rules for humans and agents editing this package.

## Package Contract

- [Manifest](topogram-generator.json): Topogram package manifest and compatibility contract.
